news.headline: Perspective Therapeutics to present data on [212Pb]VMT01 study at SMR Congress, held on Oct 10-13, 2024 in New Orleans.
news.summary: Perspective Therapeutics, Inc. revealed today in Seattle that their Phase 1/2a study of [212Pb]VMT01 has been chosen for presentation at the 21st International Congress of the Society for Melanoma Research in New Orleans, Louisiana from October 10-13, 2024. The company, traded on NYSE AMERICAN as CATX, focuses on innovative cancer treatment solutions and is known for developing radiopharmaceutical treatments. This announcement marks a significant milestone for the Company as they showcase their groundbreaking research at the prestigious conference.

news.headline: Supernus Pharmaceuticals to discuss SPN-820 study for major depression in webcast on Oct 17 at 4:30pm ET. #SUPN #Phase2a
news.summary: In Rockville, Maryland, on October 10, 2024, Supernus Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: SUPN), a biopharmaceutical company specializing in CNS disease treatments, disclosed plans for a webcast and conference call scheduled for Thursday, October 17, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The event aims to discuss findings from the open-label Phase 2a trial of SPN-820 utilized in major depressive disorder treatment.

news.headline: Nexus Industrial REIT sells 50% ownership in Old Montreal office portfolio and vacant land. (Tweet-length)
news.summary: Nexus Industrial REIT, also known as Nexus or the REIT, recently revealed the sale of its 50% ownership stake in the Old Montreal office portfolio. This includes an office building and a mixed-use building situated in Montreal. The Properties were part of the REIT's assets.

news.headline: Indiana's September home sales surpass 2023, benefited by lower mortgage rates and increased inventory.
news.summary: In Indianapolis on October 10, 2024, data from the Indiana Association of REALTORS® revealed that September saw a positive trend in the housing market. Closed and pending home sales exceeded those of 2023, attributed to lower mortgage rates, decreased price growth, and increased inventory, attracting more buyers. The latest figures indicate a promising shift in the market dynamics with a notable increase in home sales.

news.headline: Influencers should avoid normalizing natural disasters; a recent report reveals an increase in reported incidences by 20%.
Carlisle Companies (NYSE: CSL) will release Q3 2024 results on Oct 24, 2024, with a conference call scheduled at 5pm ET.
news.summary: Carlisle Companies Incorporated (NYSE:CSL) is set to announce its third quarter 2024 financial results on October 24, 2024, after the market closes. A conference call to address these results will take place at 5pm ET on the same day. Interested parties can join the call via webcast at www.carlisle.com/investors/events-and-presentations or by dialing in at the following numbers: Domestic toll-free - 800-549-8228 and International - 646-564-2877.

news.headline: IMF and Jordan agree on efficiency review, unlocking around $131m
Pye-Barker Fire & Safety acquires DACSIS, bolstering fire and security protection services. Largest provider in US.
news.summary: In Atlanta on October 10, 2024, Pye-Barker Fire & Safety, the leading provider of comprehensive fire protection, life safety, and security services in the US, announced the acquisition of DACSIS, a company specializing in fire suppression and fire alarm systems integration located in Scott. This marks a significant milestone for Pye-Barker Fire & Safety as it expands its portfolio with the addition of DACSIS and strengthens its position in the market. The acquisition demonstrates the company's commitment to growth and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Citadel Credit Union settles with DOJ, launching 'Home Help Program' to support homebuyers, enhancing commitment to brighter future.
news.summary: Citadel Credit Union, located in EXTON, Pa., has recently reached a settlement with the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) on October 10, 2024. As part of the agreement, the credit union is making commitments that include the launch of Citadel's 'Home Help Program' to assist homebuyers. This development signifies a significant move for the institution as it aims to support individuals in the housing market.

news.headline: Natus requests FDA 510(k) clearance for new point-of-care EEG solution.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Middleton-based company Natus Medical Incorporated revealed that it has filed a FDA 510(k) premarket notification to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for their Natus point-of-care EEG device. This submission marks a significant step in the approval process for the device. Clinicians who assessed the system spoke highly of its performance and features.

news.headline: Clover Health PPO Medicare Advantage Plans receive 4-star rating for 2025, driven by outstanding healthcare quality, medication adherence, and member experience.
news.summary: There was a notable increase in the overall star rating performance, primarily attributed to outstanding performance in healthcare quality measures, medication adherence, and member experience. This surge was highlighted by a significant improvement in these key areas, showcasing a commendable effort to excel in providing quality healthcare services and enhancing member satisfaction. The remarkable progress in these aspects contributed to an impressive overall star rating performance.

news.headline: Aptar authorizes $500 million share buyback and declares dividend in Crystal Lake, Illinois.
news.summary: Aptar, headquartered in Crystal Lake, Illinois, has recently announced a new share repurchase program worth $500 million. This initiative allows the company to buy back its own stock within the specified budget. In addition to this, Aptar has also declared a quarterly dividend for its shareholders. This decision reflects the company's commitment to providing value to its investors.

news.headline: Nike has appointed Tom Peddie as VP, GM of North America, replacing Scott Uzzell. Peddie will drive strategic growth.
news.summary: In Beaverton, Oregon, NIKE, Inc. (NYSE: NKE) has revealed that Tom Peddie will take over as Vice President and General Manager of the North America Geography. He will be succeeding Scott Uzzell, who has chosen to depart from the company. Peddie's return to North America is seen as a positive move, with his extensive expertise making him the ideal candidate to spearhead the region's strategic growth in the realm of sports. His excellent rapport with retailers and his adeptness in creating a cohesive marketplace will be valuable assets moving forward.

news.headline: ThreeD Capital Inc. acquires 1,483,000 common shares of Avicanna Inc., increasing ownership to over 2%.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Canadian venture capital firm ThreeD Capital Inc. made a public announcement regarding their recent acquisitions. Through transactions occurring from October 1 to October 7, 2024, ThreeD obtained ownership of 1,483,000 common shares of a company, constituting around 1.4% of all outstanding common shares. This move increased the combined ownership of ThreeD and Sheldon Inwentash, referred to as the "Joint Actor," to over 2% on a partially diluted basis. The acquisitions were focused on companies in the junior resources and disruptive technologies sectors.

news.headline: Allegion to announce 2024 third-quarter results on Oct. 24; conference call at 8 a.m. ET with analysts and investors.
news.summary: Dublin-based Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE) will announce its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 on Thursday, October 24th before the market opens. The conference call for analysts and investors, hosted by President and CEO John H. Stone and CFO Mike Wagnes, will commence at 8 a.m. ET on the same day. The call aims to discuss the company's performance. A live webcast of the conference will also be available for real-time listening.

news.headline: Genpact's AI Day attracts partners and clients for industry innovation, held in New York on Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In the bustling city of New York on October 10, 2024, Genpact (NYSE: G) held an exclusive event known as AI Day. The event served as a platform for partners and clients from various industries to come together, aiming to shape the future through the delivery of professional services and solutions by the global firm. The gathering saw an impressive number of attendees reflecting the widespread interest in advancing technologies and innovative strategies.

news.headline: Mandalay Resources reports production results and cash balance for Q3 2024, reaffirms production guidance. Stock symbols: TSX: MND, OTCQB: MNDJF.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Mandalay Resources Corporation (TSX: MND) (OTCQB: MNDJF) shared their third quarter production outcomes from Toronto. The report emphasizes sustained cash flow generation. The financial figures mentioned in the press release are in U.S. dollars, unless otherwise specified.

news.headline: MSC Industrial Supply Co. (NYSE: MSM) raises its quarterly dividend, distributing to industrial customers in North America.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, MSC Industrial Supply Co., a leading distributor of Metalworking and Maintenance, Repair, and Operations (MRO) products in North America, revealed through a PRNewswire press release that its Board of Directors has made a significant decision. MSC operates under the NYSE ticker symbol MSM.

news.headline: SilverCrest reports record revenue in Q3 2024, on track to surpass 2024 sales guidance.
news.summary: SilverCrest Metals Inc. has reported record revenue for the third quarter of 2024, positioning the company to meet or surpass its 2024 sales guidance. The company, listed on TSX as SIL and NYSE American as SILV, announced positive interim operational results on Oct. 10, 2024, from Vancouver, BC. The exact revenue numbers were not disclosed in the provided information.

news.headline: Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) announces quarterly dividend for Q3 2024. Webcast for earnings scheduled.
news.summary: In Houston on October 10th, 2024, Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) disclosed its quarterly dividend for common shares for the third quarter of 2024.

news.headline: Aura Minerals Inc. reports Q3 2024 production of 68,246 gold equivalent ounces, surpassing last year by 10% and on track to meet 2024 guidance.
news.summary: In Road Town, British Virgin Islands, on October 10, 2024, Aura Minerals Inc. disclosed its Q3 2024 preliminary production figures from its active mines - Aranzazu, Apoena (EPP), Minosa (San Andres), and Almas. The total production for Q3 2024 was reported at 68,246 gold equivalent ounces ("GEO"), demonstrating a 10% increase compared to Q2 2024 and the previous year at consistent metal prices. Notable highlights included the solid performance of Almas, which stabilized production at 15,000 GEO following a contractor change in Q2 2024, achieving a steady operational level. Additionally, Minosa displayed growth in production for yet another quarter. During this period, Aura set a new milestone by achieving a record high last twelve months (LTM) production of 269,953 GEO.

news.headline: Coherent (NYSE: COHR) wins Excellence in Sustainability Award from KLA for its efforts in sustainability.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on October 10, 2024, Coherent Corp (NYSE: COHR), a prominent player in photonics solutions for semiconductors, proudly announced receiving the Excellence in Sustainability Award from KLA. This award signifies recognition of Coherent's sustainability initiatives within the KLA Supply Chain Sustainability program.

news.headline: ROHM Semiconductor to join electronica 2024 in Munich, Germany on Nov 12-15, the leading trade fair for electronics.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, and Kyoto, Japan, on October 10, 2024, ROHM Semiconductor revealed its plans to join electronica 2024, the global premier trade fair and conference for electronic components, systems, applications, and solutions. Taking place from November 12 to 15 in Munich, Germany, this event serves as a key platform for industry players to showcase their innovations and network with peers. Attendees can anticipate engaging with cutting-edge technologies and insights that could shape the future of the electronics sector.

news.headline: Udemy to release Q3 2024 results on Oct 29; webcast at 2pm PT / 5pm ET.
news.summary: Live webcast of the conference call will commence at 2 p.m. Pacific Time and 5 p.m. Eastern Time. The call will be available for viewing online.

news.headline: California First Partner brings together tech companies and families to discuss online safety, releasing a report and guide.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the California Partners Project launched its latest Tech/Life Balance Report and Family Guide in San Francisco on October 10, 2024. The event was led by California First Partner Jennifer Siebel Newsom along with her non-profit organization. The report highlights essential insights on managing technology and life balance while the guide provides practical tips for families. This initiative aimed to address the increasing concerns around the impact of technology on daily life.

news.headline: Artera unveils 3 new products at conference attended by 100+ health systems for 40+ sessions on patient experience.
news.summary: A recent event in Santa Barbara, California brought together over 100 health systems for more than 40 sessions aimed at improving the patient experience using technology and overcoming obstacles in healthcare. Artera, a leading SaaS digital health company specializing in patient communications, announced the details during the event on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: TD Bank to admit guilt in NJ court for money laundering, per Bloomberg.
Guggenheim predicts positive effects of Fed rate cuts on leveraged credit for Q4 2024, with some uncertainties #highyield
news.summary: The impact of interest rate reductions on high yield bonds could lead to varied outcomes. While some experts predict a potential increase in investment at a time when interest rates have been cut to historically low levels - such as a reduction to 1%, high yield bonds paying 5% could be more appealing - others suggest caution due to potential risks associated with higher yield instruments. It remains to be seen whether the rate cuts will have a significantly positive or negative impact on high yield bonds.

news.headline: NASA emphasizes sustainability in low Earth orbit at IAC conference with Bill Nelson and Pam Melroy. Event spans Oct. 14-17 in Milan.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, NASA Administrator Bill Nelson and Deputy Administrator Pam Melroy are set to head the agency's delegation at the International Astronautical Congress (IAC) in Milan from October 14 to October 17. They will lead discussions on NASA's latest initiatives at the event.

news.headline: Argentina's inflation rate drops to its lowest level since 2021 under Milei's leadership.
Aehr Test Systems (NASDAQ:AEHR) beats Q1 earnings with 7 cents per share, revenue at $13.12 million, bookings at $16.8 million.
news.summary: Aehr Test Systems (NASDAQ: AEHR) released its first-quarter financial results following the closing bell on Thursday. The report revealed earnings of 7 cents per share for the quarter, surpassing the analyst consensus of 2 cents. Additionally, the company recorded quarterly revenue of $13.12 million, exceeding the consensus of $12.17 million. Bookings totaled $16.8 million, with a backlog of $16.6 million as of Aug. 30, 2024. By the end of the quarter, the company held cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash of [exact amount not provided]. More details are available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Design Well Spent Co. client Great State Burger wins space at Seattle-Tacoma Airport Concourse C Expansion. DWSC excited for partnership.
news.summary: In Seattle on October 10, 2024, Design Well Spent Co. (DWSC), a prominent retail and hospitality design firm, shared the news that their client, Great State Burger (GSB), secured Package FB7, Space CC-41 at the upcoming expansion of Concourse C at Seattle-Tacoma airport.

news.headline: Interfaith America launches podcast series "Faith in Elections" featuring civic leaders, aims to promote fair elections.
news.summary: Interfaith America, a nonprofit focusing on religious diversity and community building, has unveiled a new podcast series named Faith in Elections. This podcast presents episodes lasting between 20 to 30 minutes, showcasing prominent civic leaders who are driven by their faith to actively participate and assist communities nationwide. Operating under the fresh Voices of Interfaith America brand, the series seeks to provide audiences with an intimate view of the efforts and challenges involved in encouraging voter turnout.

news.headline: Arbor Realty TR Inc's subsidiary closes private offering, issues $100M in senior notes due 2027, guaranteed by Parent.
news.summary: Arbor Realty Trust, Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, Arbor Realty SR, Inc., successfully concluded a private placement of $100 million worth of 9.00% senior notes due on October 15, 2027. The Notes, which have been fully and unconditionally guaranteed on a senior unsecured basis by the Parent company, mark a significant financial development for the entities.

news.headline: Nevro Corp (NYSE: NVRO) will report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 11, 2024, providing solutions for chronic pain.
news.summary: In Redwood City, California on October 10, 2024, Nevro Corp. (NYSE: NVRO), a leading global medical device firm specializing in transformative treatments for chronic pain, revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024 subsequent to...

news.headline: NASA has awarded a contract to Metis Technology Solutions Inc. for aerospace research and simulation services.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, NASA announced the selection of Metis Technology Solutions Inc. from Albuquerque, New Mexico, to provide engineering services and handle the development and maintenance of software and hardware for simulations in aerospace research and development. This partnership aims to enhance aerospace capabilities and innovation in various projects headed by NASA.

news.headline: RSG International partners with Mark's Commercial to provide inclusive PPE to field employees, a first in the Canadian construction industry.
news.summary: In Whitchurch-Stouffville, ON, on October 10, 2024, RSG International has revealed a fresh collaboration with Mark's Commercial to offer comprehensive personal protective equipment (PPE) to field workers within its enterprises. This initiative will cover all employees, encompassing those at Powell Contracting.

news.headline: Crinetics Pharma granted 258,800 stock options to 27 new employees on Oct 10, 2024, under the 2021 Inducement Plan.
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Crinetics Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRNX) revealed that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors approved the granting of non-qualified stock options. These options allow the purchase of a total of 258,800 shares of the company's common stock. The awards were given to twenty-seven new non-executive employees under the 2021 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan. These stock options were granted as part of the inducement for these employees to join Crinetics in compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: SEC settles with Rimar Capital for misleading investors with AI, civil charges filed, firm accused of using AI 'buzzwords'.
news.summary: Rimar Capital, a trading firm, is facing civil charges from the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for allegedly deceiving investors about its utilization of artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs recommends buying 18 stocks and selling 7 this earnings season, predicting 10% upside in S&P 500.
news.summary: Approaching the third-quarter earnings season, Goldman Sachs has identified potential stock opportunities for investors aiming to capitalize on financial results. Analyst John Marshall and team pinpointed 18 stocks likely to benefit from upward earnings revisions and seven stocks anticipated to experience downward revisions. Emphasizing 2024 as the 'Stock Picker’s Year,' Goldman Sachs emphasized the significance of selective investing amid a volatile earnings landscape. Projections from the investment bank suggest a potential 10% upside for the average S&P 500 stock over the next year. Marshall highlighted the possibility of a relief rally, noting balanced directional positioning in the options market compared to the previous quarter. The analysts also noted a decrease in options market activity from hedge funds and retail traders, indicating a cautious "wait-and-see" approach among investors.

news.headline: AGM procedure, detail the latest proceedings of the meeting, including the important numbers discussed without specifying the source.
USA Compression Partners declares $0.525 per common unit distribution for Q3 2024, to be paid on Nov 1 to unitholders. Earnings call on Nov 5.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, USA Compression Partners, LP (NYSE: USAC) disclosed a cash distribution of $0.525 per common unit for the third quarter of 2024, totaling $2.10 annually. This distribution is scheduled to be paid on November 1, 2024, to unitholders recorded as of the close of business on October 21, 2024. Furthermore, USA Compression will unveil its third-quarter 2024 earnings before U.S. financial markets open.

news.headline: Watts Water Technologies, Inc. scheduled its Third Quarter 2024 Earnings Release and Earnings Conference Call.
news.summary: Watts Water Technologies, Inc., based in North Andover, Massachusetts, has revealed its plans to announce their third-quarter earnings for 2024. The company will release this financial information and host an earnings conference call to discuss the results. This event signifies an important moment for shareholders and analysts as they await the financial performance update.

news.headline: Altus Power, commercial solar leader, reaches over 1GW in operating assets across 25 states, with 500 projects & 25,000 subscribers.
news.summary: Altus Power, a major provider of clean electric power, has reached a significant milestone with over one gigawatt of assets in operation nationwide. The company leads in commercial solar with 500 projects spread across 25 states. Altus Power has also introduced its Community Solar program in nine states, attracting over 25,000 subscribers. The company's growth is evident from their initial project in Bridgeport, Connecticut, to their latest venture in Pueblo, Colorado.

news.headline: TXB Stores in Texas & Oklahoma partner with BrandMobile for new gamification platform to improve loyalty app frequency & engagement.
news.summary: Spicewood, TX - On October 10, 2024, Texas Born Stores (TXB) revealed a major improvement in customer service by partnering with BrandMobile. TXB, known for its restaurant-style convenience stores in Texas and Oklahoma, aims to boost customer experience with this new collaboration.

news.headline: V2X presents AI solutions, situational awareness, 5G tech at AUSA Meeting 2024, being held from Oct. 14-16 in McLean.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, on October 10, 2024, V2X, Inc. (NYSE: VVX) announced its participation in the 2024 Association of the United States Army (AUSA) Annual Meeting from October 14 to 16. The event will serve as a platform for V2X, Inc. to exhibit its innovative technologies and solutions tailored to specific missions. Attendees can learn more about the company's offerings and advancements during this three-day event.

news.headline: Luca Mining Corp. announces start of Stage 3 of Campo Morado Improvement Project.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on October 10, 2024, Luca Mining Corp. reported the progress of the Campo Morado Improvement Project. The first two stages have been completed successfully, and Stage 3 has commenced. Luca Mining Corp., trading under TSXV: LUCA, OTCQX: LUCMF, and Frankfurt: Z68, shared this update.

news.headline: Encompass Health will announce Q3 results on Oct. 28, 2024, after the market closes and host an investor call on Oct. 29, 2024 at 10am ET.
news.summary: Encompass Health Corp., trading under the ticker symbol EHC on the New York Stock Exchange, disclosed plans to release its financial results for the third quarter concluding on Sept. 30, 2024, post market closing on Monday, Oct. 28, 2024. A conference call for investors has been scheduled for 10 a.m. ET on that day.

news.headline: American Water is reactivating systems after a cyber event, no impact on water quality. Largest US utility, no facility impact.
news.summary: American Water, the leading regulated water and wastewater utility firm in the U.S., disclosed plans to systematically and securely restore systems offline following a cybersecurity issue reported on October 7. The Company assures no evidence of impact on its water and wastewater facilities, with no compromise on water quality reported. American Water (NYSE: AWK) is progressively reactivating systems following the incident.

news.headline: Check out CEO Roberts discussing future of media on Bloomberg.
